name: Kraut Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt shortening in a skillet.
2. Add beef, cabbage, and onion to the skillet. Cook until the cabbage is nearly done; do not brown the meat.
3. Drain excess fat, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Roll the bread dough (which has risen once) into a rectangle that is 1/4-inch thick.
5. Cut the dough into squares measuring about 5-6 inches each.
6. Place 2-3 tablespoons of the cabbage mixture onto each square.
7. Fold the corners together and pinch the sides shut to form patties.
8. Let the patties rise for 20 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
10. Bake the patties for about 20 minutes, or until they are browned on top.
11. Brush the tops with melted butter as the dough cools.
